name: low-context
description: Low-context vs high-context communication. Positive prompts are explicit, literal, detailed, and spell everything out. Negative prompts rely on shared knowledge, implication, and subtlety.

pairs.positive: The meeting is at 2:00 PM Eastern Time on Thursday, March 12th, in Conference Room B on the third floor. Please bring a printed copy of the Q1 report.
pairs.negative: See you Thursday at the usual time and place. You know what to bring.

pairs.positive: I disagree with your proposal because the cost estimate ignores infrastructure expenses, which historically add 30% to the total.
pairs.negative: I have some reservations about the proposal. You might want to take another look at the numbers.

pairs.positive: Please water the plants every Monday and Thursday morning with approximately 500 milliliters of water each.
pairs.negative: Just keep the plants alive while I'm gone. You know the drill.

pairs.positive: I'm upset because you promised to call me yesterday evening and you didn't. I need you to follow through on commitments.
pairs.negative: I'm fine. It's nothing. Don't worry about it.

pairs.positive: The project failed for three specific reasons: insufficient testing, unclear requirements, and a two-week delay in the vendor delivery.
pairs.negative: The project had issues. You know how these things go when too many things are up in the air.

pairs.positive: Turn left at the second traffic light, drive 200 meters, and the building will be on your right. It has a blue awning.
pairs.negative: It's near that place we went last time, past the big intersection. You'll know it when you see it.

pairs.positive: I need this report finished by 5 PM on Friday. It must include revenue figures, expense breakdowns, and a summary paragraph.
pairs.negative: Get the report done soon. Include the usual stuff.

pairs.positive: The recipe requires 200 grams of all-purpose flour, two large eggs, 150 milliliters of whole milk, and a pinch of salt.
pairs.negative: Just mix the flour, eggs, and milk until it looks right. You'll get a feel for it.

pairs.positive: I'm declining the invitation because I have a prior commitment on that date: my daughter's school recital at 6 PM.
pairs.negative: I can't make it. Something came up. Sorry about that.

pairs.positive: The bug occurs when a user submits the form with an empty email field on Chrome version 120 on Windows 11.
pairs.negative: There's a bug with the form. It happens sometimes when certain fields are weird.

pairs.positive: My feedback on your essay: the thesis is unclear in paragraph one, the evidence in section three doesn't support the claim, and the conclusion introduces new arguments.
pairs.negative: The essay needs some work. A few parts felt a bit off to me.

pairs.positive: I'm looking for a navy blue cotton dress shirt, size medium, with a button-down collar and no chest pocket.
pairs.negative: I need a nice shirt. You know the kind I like.

pairs.positive: The annual performance review will evaluate three areas: project delivery measured by on-time completion rate, collaboration rated by peer feedback scores, and skill development tracked through completed certifications.
pairs.negative: The review will cover the usual areas. You've been through this before.

pairs.positive: Please arrive at the airport three hours before the international departure, which is at 7:15 AM from Terminal 3, Gate B22.
pairs.negative: Get to the airport early. It's an international flight, so you know how it is.

pairs.positive: The paint color I want is Benjamin Moore Hale Navy HC-154, in eggshell finish, for the bedroom walls only.
pairs.negative: I want a dark blue for the bedroom. Something that feels right for the space.

pairs.positive: I returned the product because the zipper broke after two uses, the stitching on the left pocket was loose, and it was a full size smaller than labeled.
pairs.negative: The product wasn't great. Quality issues, basically. Not what I expected.

pairs.positive: Our policy is that refunds are issued within 14 business days to the original payment method for items returned in unused condition with a receipt.
pairs.negative: Returns are handled the usual way. Just bring it back and we'll sort it out.

pairs.positive: The dog needs to be fed twice daily: one cup of dry food at 7 AM and one cup at 6 PM. Fresh water in the steel bowl, changed daily.
pairs.negative: Feed the dog morning and evening. He'll let you know if something's off.

pairs.positive: I chose this school for my daughter because it has a 95% college placement rate, a 12:1 student-teacher ratio, and an advanced STEM program.
pairs.negative: It felt like the right school. The atmosphere was good and people spoke highly of it.

pairs.positive: The contract states payment of $5,000 due within 30 days of project completion, with a 2% late fee per month for overdue balances.
pairs.negative: We'll settle up after the project wraps. Standard terms apply.

pairs.positive: I exercise Monday, Wednesday, and Friday: 30 minutes of running at 6:00 AM followed by 20 minutes of strength training.
pairs.negative: I work out a few times a week. Cardio and weights, nothing crazy.

pairs.positive: The error message reads: 'Connection refused on port 5432. PostgreSQL service is not running on host 10.0.1.5.'
pairs.negative: The database isn't connecting. It's that same issue we had before.

pairs.positive: I need a plumber on Tuesday between 10 AM and noon to fix a leaking pipe under the kitchen sink. The pipe is copper, half-inch diameter.
pairs.negative: The kitchen sink is leaking again. Can someone come by early this week?

pairs.positive: The medication should be taken once daily with food, specifically one 10mg tablet in the morning, and should not be combined with grapefruit.
pairs.negative: Take one a day with breakfast. The doctor mentioned some food interaction, so be careful.

pairs.positive: Sales declined 12% quarter over quarter, driven by a 20% drop in the enterprise segment and a 3% increase in consumer.
pairs.negative: Sales were down this quarter. Enterprise was weak, but consumer held up okay.

pairs.positive: The apartment is 650 square feet, on the fourth floor, with one bedroom, one bathroom, a washer-dryer in unit, and a south-facing balcony.
pairs.negative: It's a nice one-bedroom with good light and some extras. Decent size for the area.

pairs.positive: The cake requires baking at 175 degrees Celsius for exactly 35 minutes in a preheated oven on the middle rack.
pairs.negative: Bake until it looks done. Every oven is different, so keep an eye on it.

pairs.positive: I'm requesting three days of vacation: April 14th, 15th, and 16th. My colleague Sarah has agreed to cover my responsibilities.
pairs.negative: I'll be out for a few days next month. Don't worry, someone's covering for me.

pairs.positive: The venue holds 200 people, charges $3,000 for the space, $45 per person for catering, and requires a $1,000 deposit by March 1st.
pairs.negative: The venue is a good size and reasonably priced. We'd need to put something down soon to hold the date.

pairs.positive: The tire pressure should be set to 35 PSI for all four tires, checked when cold, using the gauge in the glove compartment.
pairs.negative: Make sure the tires are properly inflated. There's a gauge in the car somewhere.
